mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_device_command_record_history ( id, command_id, device_id, device_code, command_type, device_type, status, fail_reason, operator, params_json, ack_data_json, send_time, ack_time, create_time, update_time, backup_time ) SELECT id, command_id, device_id, device_code, command_type, device_type, status, fail_reason, operator, params_json, ack_data_json, send_time, ack_time, create_time, update_time, NOW() FROM iot_device_command_record WHERE id IN
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM iot_device_command_record WHERE id IN
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_device_operation_log_history ( id, device_id, device_code, operation_type, operation_desc, operation_detail, operation_source, operation_result, fail_reason, operator, client_ip, create_time, operation_time, backup_time ) SELECT id, device_id, device_code, operation_type, operation_desc, operation_detail, operation_source, operation_result, fail_reason, operator, client_ip, create_time, operation_time, NOW() FROM iot_device_operation_log WHERE id IN
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM iot_device_operation_log WHERE id IN
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_mq_message_log_history ( id, direction, topic, tag, consumer_group, message_id, message_body, caller_class, status, fail_reason, cost_time, trace_id, create_time, backup_time ) SELECT id, direction, topic, tag, consumer_group, message_id, message_body, caller_class, status, fail_reason, cost_time, trace_id, create_time, NOW() FROM iot_mq_message_log WHERE id IN
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM iot_mq_message_log WHERE id IN
